title: Pathways Relating Amnestic MCI to a Mild Traumatic Brain Injury History

skipped_criteria: Inclusion #1: Active diagnosis of amnestic mild cognitive impairment — no schema field for cognitive diagnosis.
Inclusion #2: Presence or absence of mTBI history for group assignment — no schema field for prior mTBI history (presumed_tbi reflects current suspicion, not historical diagnosis).
Inclusion #3: Female and male subjects — no actionable exclusion; all sex values are permitted.
Inclusion #4: All races/ethnicities — no schema field for race/ethnicity.
Inclusion #6: Fluent in English — no schema field for language fluency.
Exclusion #1: Mild traumatic brain injury within past year — no schema field for temporal history of prior mTBI.
Exclusion #2: Lifetime history of moderate or severe brain injury — no schema field for injury severity history.
Exclusion #3: Lifetime major neurologic syndromes (stroke, epilepsy, brain tumor) — no schema field for neurologic history.
Exclusion #4: Lifetime major cardiovascular conditions (heart attack, heart failure) — no schema field for cardiovascular history.
Exclusion #5: Current substance use disorder — no schema field for substance use disorder.
Exclusion #6: Current major psychiatric disorders — no schema field for psychiatric diagnoses.
Exclusion #7: Current vision or hearing impairment interfering with testing — no schema field for sensory impairment.
Exclusion #8: Any electronic or metallic implants in the skull or brain — no schema field for implant status.
Exclusion #9: Current medication use known to alter HD-tDCS reactivity — no schema field for medication use.
